name: testrix
description: Testrix — Angular + Electron desktop shell scaffold
author: Testrix contributors

scripts.build: npm run sync:brand && ng build --configuration production && npm run electron:bundle
scripts.build:pack: npm run sync:brand && ng build --configuration pack && npm run electron:bundle
scripts.electron:build:win:payload: node scripts/prepare-win-payload-build.mjs && node scripts/no-code-sign-discovery.mjs npm run build:pack && node scripts/run-electron-builder-win-payload.mjs && node scripts/verify-win-payload.mjs && node scripts/embed-win-icon.mjs
scripts.electron:build:win:payload:release: node scripts/prepare-win-payload-build.mjs && npm run build:pack && node scripts/run-electron-builder-win-payload.mjs && node scripts/verify-win-payload.mjs && node scripts/embed-win-icon.mjs
scripts.electron:build:win:setup: npm run installer:windows-assets && node scripts/sync-installer-payload.mjs --platform=win && node scripts/clean-setup-shell.mjs && cd installer-shell && npm install && node ../scripts/no-code-sign-discovery.mjs npm run pack:win && node ../scripts/finalize-installer.mjs --platform=win
scripts.electron:build:win:setup:release: npm run installer:windows-assets && node scripts/sync-installer-payload.mjs --platform=win && node scripts/clean-setup-shell.mjs && cd installer-shell && npm install && npm run pack:win && node ../scripts/finalize-installer.mjs --platform=win
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run electron:build:win:payload && npm run electron:build:win:setup && node scripts/finalize-installer.mjs --platform=win
scripts.electron:build:win:release: npm run electron:build:win:payload:release && npm run electron:build:win:setup:release && node scripts/finalize-installer.mjs --platform=win && node scripts/sign-win-release.mjs && node scripts/verify-win-signature.mjs
scripts.electron:build:linux:payload: npm run build:pack && node scripts/no-code-sign-discovery.mjs npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux dir --publish never
scripts.electron:build:linux:setup: node scripts/sync-installer-payload.mjs --platform=linux && node scripts/clean-setup-shell.mjs && cd installer-shell && npm install && npm run pack:linux && node ../scripts/finalize-installer.mjs --platform=linux
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run electron:build:linux:payload && npm run electron:build:linux:setup
scripts.electron:build:mac:payload: npm run build:pack && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dir --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac:setup: node scripts/sync-installer-payload.mjs --platform=mac && node scripts/clean-setup-shell.mjs && cd installer-shell && npm install && npm run pack:mac && node ../scripts/finalize-installer.mjs --platform=mac
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run electron:build:mac:payload && npm run electron:build:mac:setup
